title: Cleanup Manifest
description: Inventory of every database object the generated pipeline creates (staging tables in intermediate_db, target tables it truncates/writes), with the exact command to remove/reset each. Produced by the Artifact Generator from dependency_graph.json and every buildspec. Consumed exclusively by the Clean plan, which never derives this list itself.

command.description: Fully resolved SQL statement (DROP/TRUNCATE), never a template.
